title: brachyglottis bellidioides var. orbiculata
intro: Brachyglottis bellidioides var. orbiculata, also known as the Broad-leaved Tree Daisy or New Zealand tree daisy, is a plant species native to New Zealand. It is a shrub-like flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Brachyglottis bellidioides var. orbiculata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and is believed to offer health benefits including soothing digestive issues and reducing fever.
